languages.text: "Забудьте. Объяснить это сложнее, чем я дума{mf|л|ла}".
"Forget it. It is more difficult to explain than I thought."
languages.original_text: "Забудьте. Объяснить это сложнее, чем я дума{mf|л|ла}".

traits.locale_text: "Forget it. It is more difficult to explain than I thought."
"Forget it. It is more difficult to explain than I thought."
"Forget it. It is more difficult to explain than I thought."

languages.original_text: "Forget it. It is more difficult to explain than I thought."

languages.text: « Oubliez ce que j'ai dit. C'est plus difficile à expliquer que je le pensais. »
languages.original_text: "Forget it. It is more difficult to explain than I thought."

traits.locale_text: « Oubliez ce que j'ai dit. C'est plus difficile à expliquer que je le pensais. »

languages.text: "Hiçbir şey demedim say. Açıklaması sandığımdan daha zormuş."
languages.original_text: "Forget it. It is more difficult to explain than I thought."

traits.locale_text: "Hiçbir şey demedim say. Açıklaması sandığımdan daha zormuş."

languages.text: «Olvídelo. Es más difícil de explicar de lo que pensaba».
languages.original_text: "Forget it. It is more difficult to explain than I thought."

traits.locale_text: «Olvídelo. Es más difícil de explicar de lo que pensaba».

languages.text: "Vergesst es. Es ist schwieriger zu erklären, als ich dachte."
languages.original_text: "Forget it. It is more difficult to explain than I thought."

traits.locale_text: "Vergesst es. Es ist schwieriger zu erklären, als ich dachte."

languages.text: 「忘れてください。私が思っていたよりも説明するのが難しいです。」
languages.original_text: "Forget it. It is more difficult to explain than I thought."

traits.locale_text: 「忘れてください。私が思っていたよりも説明するのが難しいです。」
